text.title: Claude Code Hooks Output Contract
text.summary: JSON-schema output contract the subagent applying claude-code-hooks must produce. Required fields, forbidden patterns, allowed transformations, plus valid + invalid worked examples.

section.title: Output schema (JSON Schema draft-07)

forbidden.pattern: Hook command executes without exit-code handling (silent failure).
Secrets-gate hook missing on a PreToolUse that runs network/file writes.
Hook command is interactive (blocks the agent).

allowed-transformations.transformation: Order arrays deterministically by their natural key before serialising.

example.note: All required fields populated; forbidden patterns absent.
Missing the first required field — schema rejects.

list.item: All required fields present and non-null.
